just kind of want to go in and do an ad like for instance I just had a newsletter I go out today and the guy before I purchased it from him he said Dagan you know July 5th right after the 4th of July a first test for me so I'd rather hit you where you think you're weak and then do a second mailing where you think you're strong and then I can get a overall feel for how your news that are performed for me so I am time or day agnostic individually but from a rational standpoint mark beginning of the month is always good because the rationale is that's when people just got paid and all that sort of stuff so if you time your ad supposedly around when people have money which is the beginning of the month and right after the 15th of the month then you should have a higher conversion I've never tracked that closely it just hasn't been that important to me but that's the rationale so use it as you like and that's my take on it hopefully that answers the question big mark Rich is asking what is the difference between a Weber and hyper tracker that's a very good question and guys you know what I'm gonna do I'm hesitant to do this but I'm gonna do this and work it out let me answer Rich's question first and I'll let you know what I'm gonna do for you guys I think will be valuable so the difference between a Weber you can go to a Weber a Weber and a website well like hyper tracker is is what is a Weber is a an auto responder so rich when you go out and you do a newsletter ad and you send traffic to a landing page and then people opt in they're opting into your a Weber auto responder account so it's where all your leads email addresses are kept in a database so you can contact them hyper tracker is a completely different type of a tool it is a tracking tool so you will send your traffic through your hyper tracker link and that will tell you how many how much traffic you got compared to how many leads opted in and how much money you made once you have your tracking pixels right so one creates a database of prospects for you the other lets you track your marketing metrics so you know what's going on when you're out there advertising so just two two different tools saturation effect that we should fear about when advertising in the same publication and people people seeing the same message over and over again and the answer is yes there's certainly a saturation effect at a point but I feel totally safe advertising in a mid-sized newsletter meaning less than a hundred thousand people once a month and if that newsletter is bigger like let's say 300 to over a million 300 thousand to over a million people I feel comfortable advertising in that publication more often than once a month and really it comes down to mark more than how large the list is how fast they're bringing new subscribers into that list so a question that you can always ask and should ask publishers when you're getting ready to go out there and and place an ad is you know on a daily basis how quickly is your list growing how many new subscribers are you bringing on to the list and you know by what methods are they coming on to the list and that will give you a very good indication of how fresh how responsive and how often you should be mailing that list for instance if it's a let's say a hundred thousand person mailing list and they're growing by 200 people per day feel safe mailing that list I would say more often than a month but very very safely mailing it once a month and having same same sort of phenomenal results month after month like I said DEMC is one of my favorite favorite newsletters I think their subscriber base only grows by maybe 500 people per month but I have an ad that goes out with them every single month and every single month does well for me so Mark hopefully that answers your question and from it from several different angles but I wouldn't hit the same list over and over again with the same offer more than a month depending on madness alright so E2 is asking what do I look for when I split test so great question and we'll go over to the website optimizer so here's a split test and I'm running you look when you're doing a split test to have a control version so something that consistently converts well for you and you look to change one specific thing between the control the best converting offer that you have and something else to see if you can beat that control so as an example from one of the split tests and I'm running right now the question that I asked myself is if this is our current top converting landing page what happens if I change stuff up a little bit I unbolt some stuff I highlight some other stuff and I you know bold other stuff and I underlined so does that affect conversions all I did I didn't change the text I didn't change you know anything like that I just changed the highlighting and the emphasis on some of the points that's a split test compared to the control which converts better and when you do that you find some interesting things you can do this with any component in your funnel I've done it I'm focusing on landing pages right now because it's really fun for me but you know you can do for anything in your funnel I've done split tests on order forms on sales videos on OTOs on anything everything and you learn some cool stuff and sometimes these split tests I have to act a little weird for you like this split test the whole time you know up until here which was several days of the original version of this landing page was what was winning but now recently this new version of my landing page which has the highlights and stuff is winning now I don't know why but eventually I'll know which one works better because there will be a statistical significance winner at the end of all this and it's another one of the benefits of the inner circle is you know like I said if you go into what's working now I have an entire split test library which I'm going to be turning into its own membership in the future where you just get the results of all of my split tests so instant conversion boost you know what I mean and so you're just looking to change one thing and when you get a winner that becomes your new control and then from that new control you change one other thing and you keep playing that way that's the simplest way I think the most powerful way to do split tests and so hopefully that answers the question you too should we should so Joel is saying should you guys be using Google Optimizer to to to to run your split tests on your capture pages I like it it's really simple to use like everything else there's lots of different versions and you know types of things that do the same thing that Optimizer does but I like Optimizer it does what I want it to do it's free and that's why I would say people should start with it it's really simple to do simple to use and there's lots and lots of trainings in the inner circle on how to set up split tests and you can do a search in there and you can find them so I won't waste time on that right here but it's one of the most powerful things that you can do get leads continue to split tests to see what works better okay and here's the other thing about some of my split tests as you can see here I mean this split test so far has taken almost almost 800 leads and I think actually if we go back here it's over 800 leads to get to where it is now 879 leads to get to where it is now that's a lot of leads right that's a lot of leads to run through to get to a point where one's winning by 5% so in other words by going through the split says that I have available for you guys and you don't have to go through and like get all these leads because if you do that in dollars and cents that's a lot of dollars and cents that you had to spend to get to here instead of just taking what I have and running with it so do split test yourself because they're fun but I've done some of the hard work for you so Ola Ola wants to know what's the typical lead conversion rate from a solo ad so traffic to lead conversion is I don't like to see less than 30% I typically with a decent newsletter see between 40 and 50% traffic to lead so that would be the answer but below 30 is fine but you want to see at least 30 up to 40 50 or better you know there's definitely situations where there's close to 60% conversions or higher but that's the answer okay so rich is saying I haven't looked at the template yet but I see a lot of graphics in your ad are those graphics available to use are those other profitability so a good rule of thumb if you want to scale up to the highest levels possible like everyone's mailing your stuff you're in all the networks are getting thousands of leads per day you want to create a per click value in EPC of at least a dollar fifty to two dollars and fifty cents per click so that means if you do a newsletter marketing campaign and you go back and you look at the per click value of that newsletter ad for you and it's over a dollar fifty you can scale pretty big so all that sort of info is you can you know look inside of your hyper tracker account and it'll name wrong people get my name wrong all the time too the question is I have a lot of offline new team members in my network marketing business none of them have an auto responder however I'd like to set up a co-op so people can start getting leads and start promoting the business any suggestions yeah so here's how we think about this from an entrepreneurial standpoint and we have two directions that we can go problem is as you just stated is you have a lot of people that are eager and ready and want to build but the problem is they're offline people and have no idea how to do things online so we have two options do we teach them to use the online methods or do we do and take control of the offline methods for them on the online methods excuse me for them and serve them what they're used to if the goal is speed then our answer is we take control of that online component so my answer would be this this is how I would do it that a whole bunch of people offline that you know we're eager and ready to build they don't know how to do the online stuff I wouldn't try and make them learn it because that's going to create a huge job for you what I would do is I would create a a marketing co-op for them where you generate the traffic and the leads in the database and on a daily basis you just split up the leads so here's how you would do it you create your own landing page now wouldn't be like this because with just an email they can't handle that info you would have to have a landing page that had email name address possibly address but at least email name and phone number and then every day as results came in you would then divide those leads by sending them an email to the folks that are in the co-op with you to make contact with you should not set the expectation that they're going to get XYZ amount of leads you should set the expectation that there's a huge opportunity for them to get high quality leads online and you can help them get them by just partaking in your co-op and I would say blatantly look I don't know how this is going to go but I think if we start at a share cost of XYZ and I show you guys what I'm doing you know we can get some very good value out of this and I'm going to divide everything equally so if you're not happy with the results just let me know I'll let you you know I'll give you your money back it's for your team so that's how I would sense yeah so my my lead capture page Joel says how to make $5,000 per day Joel saying I can't say I can make $5,000 per day and show you how to make $5,000 per say what can be enticing and interesting to a prospect on my landing page that is ethical and is something that I can offer that they'd be highly interested in learning I totally get it so one of the best highest converting headlines that I've ever found especially when it comes to network marketing is how to guarantee you make money in your network marketing business free how to guarantee you make money in your network marketing business using just the internet you didn't give any specifics you didn't give any names you know you didn't say anything outrageous but you're making a promise that is going to resonate because most network marketers don't make any money and they want to they want to guarantee they do because they've worked hard and so therefore anyone could steal that generic ad line and it would convert for them so you can go in that direction Joel and you'll be just absolutely fine the other thing Joel that I would say to you is think about where your prospects are when they're deciding to opt in most of them are in the place where they're just deciding to start a business right and so their mindset isn't necessarily how can I make a million dollars right now it'd be great that's a huge amazing dream to build towards but more so they're looking for positive validation on the fact that they're desiring to start a business and they're looking for some positive reinforcement to say they're moving in the right direction so what seems to be like yeah I need to say big things to get leads isn't the case because they are not looking for big results they very much want results so how to get 20 leads per day for absolutely free with your blog using doing nothing but creating a simple blog seven tricks to generate five leads per day for absolutely free okay things like this people opt into all day long we're not making huge outrageous claims so hopefully that gives you some some ideas to think in terms of and here's one point I want to step back and say I said it in one of our recent inner circle trainings that think will be valuable instead of thinking about how can I go out and give people like a crazy outrageous here's how to make a trillion dollars in a second offer asked him what are you gonna put in your video to bring people to your website to want to opt in he said well I'm running a co-op I'm gonna talk about my co-op I have a system I'm gonna tell about my system and I'm gonna give it to him for free and all this sort of stuff and I said you know that's cool that will get you some conversions but what if we do it differently what if we think about it like this where are they emotionally right now and I went through the same stuff that I'm talking to you guys about and I led my consult client down this path I asked him you know Joe when you were thinking about starting a business really starting a business take me back to that moment tell me the story of why you made that decision and he told me that you know the reason that he started his business the definitive reason was he remembered coming home from work and seeing how big his daughter had gotten and how how mad he got it himself and how you know emotionally got about this because he wasn't around and he didn't want that to be the way that she grew up or the way that you know he had his life with her and that's what made him decide to start a business and not turn back now my thought is if you share that with a person as soon as they become your lead or somewhere in that process that's much more authentic and it's gonna hit them where they're thinking in a much more authentic way it's gonna have them trust you it's gonna validate and give them positive reinforcement that they're thinking the right things and they're doing the right things and for that I think goes to this guy one goes to this guy one goes to this woman one goes to this woman etc etc and leave it at that at the beginning because you're not promising them the moon and the stars you're
